description: RaptorQ durability coverage requirements for long-lived V1 artifacts

fixtures.rationale: Fixture corruption would silently invalidate conformance guarantees

oracle_recapture.description: Oracle recapture matrix - tracks fixture freshness
oracle_recapture.rationale: Key evidence artifact for oracle parity claims

reliability_budgets.rationale: Corrupted budgets could mask reliability regressions

benchmark_baselines.rationale: Baseline corruption would invalidate perf gate comparisons

e2e_logs.description: E2E forensic logs - ephemeral test evidence
e2e_logs.rationale: Regenerated on every test run; triplet would be stale immediately

schemas.rationale: Version-controlled source files, not generated artifacts

phase2c_manifests.rationale: Historical migration artifacts; integrity verified at extraction time

coverage_target.notes: All required artifacts must have sidecar + scrub + proof triplet
